title: November 14
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|November|hide31=yes}}

'''November 14''' is the 318th day of the year (319th in leap years), with 47 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1940s#1945|1945]] – [[Paul Hirsch]] is born.
*[[1960s#1961|1961]] – [[Carlos Pacheco]] is born.
*[[1960s#1969|1969]] – [[Stéphane Créty]] is born.
*[[1973]] – [[Dana Snyder]] is born.
*[[1979]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 90|''Star Wars Weekly'' 90]] published.
*[[1982]] – ''[[Iceworld]]'' [[Star Wars (comic strip)|comic strip]] concludes.
*[[1997]] – [[Ivanna Sakhno]] is born.
*[[2000]] – ''[[Darth Maul's Revenge]]'' published.
*[[2001]] – [[Jedi Quest 3|''Jedi Quest'' 3]] published.
*[[2002]] – [[Star Wars: The New Droid Army|''The New Droid Army'']] released.
*[[2003]] – "[[Clone Wars Chapter 6]]" premieres on [[Cartoon Network]].
*2003 – [[Star Wars Insider 72|''Star Wars Insider'' 72]] released for subscribers.
*[[2005]] – [[Star Wars Insider 85|''Star Wars Insider'' 85]] released for subscribers.
*[[2006]] – ''[[Sculpting a Galaxy: Inside the Star Wars Model Shop]]'' published, including ''[[From Putty to Pixels]]''.
*[[2008]] – "[[Duel of the Droids]]" premieres on Cartoon Network.
*[[2012]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Ultimate Action Figure Collection]]'' published.
*[[2013]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic UK 6.53]]'' published.
*[[2017]] – ''[[Star Wars Battlefront II]]'' Elite Trooper Deluxe Edition released.
*[[2018]] – [[Darth Vader (2017) 23|''Darth Vader'' (2017) 23]] published.
*2018 – [[Doctor Aphra (2016) 26|''Doctor Aphra'' (2016) 26]] published.
*[[2023]] – ''[[The High Republic: The Eye of Darkness]]'' published.
*2023 – [[The High Republic: The Eye of Darkness (audiobook)|''The High Republic: The Eye of Darkness'' audiobook]] released.
*2023 – ''[[Star Wars Legends Epic Collection: The Empire Vol. 8]]'' published.
*[[2024]] – ''[[The High Republic: Seeds of Starlight]]'' published.
<noinclude>
